title: Taxonomy — Categories tab
caption: The Taxonomy page now has a select-all header checkbox and a per-row checkbox on every term (Categories tab). 44 real categories are present.

title: Filtered to the 3 test categories
caption: Client-side search "ZZ Bulk Test" narrows the list to the 3 throwaway categories (rows shown: 3).

title: 3 selected — bulk action bar appears
caption: The 3 rows are checked and the bulk action bar shows the selection with a Delete action. (3 checkboxes ticked.)

title: After bulk delete — the 3 are gone
caption: After Delete → confirm, the 3 test categories are removed (filtered rows now: 0); their post associations cascade away at the DB level. The 44 real categories are untouched.
